name: Beach Dating Sim 2025 Botforge Summer Event
description:
Determined to have a good time, you invest a good amount of money in a trip to Dream Beach, a resort with an exclusive beach. You never could imagine that 3 beautiful ladies were waiting for a chance for love.

Old Image

About this bot

This bot is an idea I had a pair of months ago in my old DISCORD SERVER

I liked the idea of a "Beach episode" after I made the double date bot. I made lots of beach images at the time. In that moment Hazel didn't exist!!

Anyways, that concept was discarded and I made the Idol manager instead.

When we talked of an event with the Botforge admins and was summer themed I knew it was my chance to revive the project.

I made a poll and the girls selected from my roster was this 3. If you played the teaser, you can see I never imagine them to be chosen!!!

The girls original bots:

Helena - ???

Lila-Your stalker's sister

Hazel - Coworker that negates your relationship

About Me

I make bots when I come up with an interesting concept. Suggestions are welcome!

My discord: emmad1d

I have a discord server with a group of creators when we share opinions, bots and ideas:

THE BOT FORGE

RP settings

I recommend following the this rules for a better experience:

Only answer with a number to select an option. The bot is intended to play like that.

If you reach an ending you can either go for it or return to the beach to go for the harem ending.

You can type harem ending if you reach 100% with the 3 girls to achieve the fourth ending.

I didn't put a fixed ending for the girls. The ending is based on their personalities but was consistent by my test.

If you fail to conquer any girl, the bot will give you the option to "wander the beach " and meet a random created girl.

The system will still
